file.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Auto-detect safe END_DATE for paper-trade sims.

Returns min of (today-1, lagged_pos_ov max, 5state max, BQ ticker max).
intraday_full.pkl is NOT a hard cap — sim falls back to T+1 Open when missing.
"""
import os, pickle
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
START_DATE = "2026-04-01"  # paper-trade window start (canonical)


def detect_end_date(bq_check=False) -> str:
    cands = [pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date()) - pd.Timedelta(days=1)]
    try:
        with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "lagged_pos_ov.pkl"), "rb") as f:
            ov = pickle.load(f)
        cands.append(pd.to_datetime(ov["time"]).max())
    except Exception:
        pass
    if bq_check:
        try:
            import subprocess
            r = subprocess.run(
                ["bq", "query", "--use_legacy_sql=false",
                 "--project_id=[REDACTED]", "--format=csv",
                 "SELECT MAX(s.time) FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s"],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
            lines = [l for l in r.stdout.splitlines() if l and not l.startswith("f0_")]
            if lines:
                cands.append(pd.Timestamp(lines[0]))
        except Exception:
            pass
    return min(cands).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"START_DATE={START_DATE}")
    print(f"END_DATE={detect_end_date(bq_check=True)}")

1	@echo off
2	REM Daily paper-trade orchestrator — runs 4 sims + comparison.
3	REM Triggered by Windows Task Scheduler at 15:30 daily.
4	REM Logs each run to data\papertrade_run_YYYY-MM-DD.log
5	REM
6	REM Updated 2026-05-27:
7	REM  - Removed pt_v12_live (V3 alt state test, no longer needed)
8	REM  - UPGRADED V11: KELLY ETF + DT_10_25_25 state (validated +1.90pp Full CAGR)
9	REM  - Renamed versions to architecture-based names for clarity:
10	REM    V11        = Song Sinh (BAL+VN30) + KELLY + DT_10_25_25  ⭐ upgraded
11	REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
12	REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE
13	REM    V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL parking {3:1.0}
14	
15	setlocal
16	set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
17	set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
18	set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\papertrade_run_%TODAY%.log
19	
20	cd /d "%WORKDIR%"
21	
22	echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
23	echo Paper-trade daily run (5 systems + DT A/B) — %DATE% %TIME% >> "%LOGFILE%"
24	echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"
25	
26	echo [0a] pull_us_market.py  (refresh US VIX/SPX -^> us_market_history.csv, Pillar B) >> "%LOGFILE%"
27	python pull_us_market.py                                              >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
28	
29	echo [0a2] rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat  (self-update v3.4b+DT4 state from BQ ticker, local only) >> "%LOGFILE%"
30	call rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat                                    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
31	
32	echo [0/6] refresh_lagged_caches.py  (extend px/ov/surprise/events to latest BQ) >> "%LOGFILE%"
33	python refresh_lagged_caches.py                                       >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
34	
35	echo [0b] snapshot_state_vintage.py  (accumulate point-in-time state vintage) >> "%LOGFILE%"
36	python snapshot_state_vintage.py                                      >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
37	
38	echo [0c] macro_healthcheck.py  (DT5G feed health + fail-safe gate -^> data\macro_health.json) >> "%LOGFILE%"
39	python macro_healthcheck.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
40	
41	echo [0d] publish_gated_state.py  (publish DT5G gated state -^> BQ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live) >> "%LOGFILE%"
42	python deploy_golive_dt5g_v4\publish_gated_state.py                  >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
43	
44	echo [0e] golive_recommend.py  (V4 12.1 LAYER2 picks: BAL + VN30/LAGGED -^> out\golive_recommendations_DATE.csv, read by 18:00 report) >> "%LOGFILE%"
45	python deploy_golive_dt5g_v4\golive_recommend.py                    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
46	
47	REM === Production base = DT4G + MACRO overlay (adopted 2026-05-29) ===
48	echo [1/4] pt_v11_tq34b.py        (V11 = Song Sinh + KELLY + DT4G+MACRO) >> "%LOGFILE%"
49	python pt_v11_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
50	
51	echo [2/4] pt_v12_macro.py        (V12 = Am Duong: BAL+LAGGED + DT4G+MACRO) >> "%LOGFILE%"
52	python pt_v12_macro.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
53	
54	REM Retired 2026-05-29 (DT4G+macro adopted as base): pt_v12_tq34b (old TQ34b base),
55	REM pt_v12_dt4 (DT-only shadow) -- both superseded by pt_v12_macro.
56	
57	echo [3/4] pt_v121_ensemble.py    (V121_ENS: V12.1 + Ensemble + BASE + TQ34b*) >> "%LOGFILE%"
58	python pt_v121_ensemble.py                                             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
59	REM *ensemble still on TQ34b pending DT4G+macro integrated validation (research: DT hurts ensemble OOS)
60	
61	echo [4/4] pt_v121_ens_q2.py      (V121_Kelly: V121_ENS + Kelly + TQ34b*) >> "%LOGFILE%"

@echo off
REM Daily paper-trade orchestrator — runs 4 sims + comparison.
REM Triggered by Windows Task Scheduler at 15:30 daily.
REM Logs each run to data\papertrade_run_YYYY-MM-DD.log
REM
REM Updated 2026-05-27:
REM  - Removed pt_v12_live (V3 alt state test, no longer needed)
REM  - UPGRADED V11: KELLY ETF + DT_10_25_25 state (validated +1.90pp Full CAGR)
REM  - Renamed versions to architecture-based names for clarity:
REM    V11        = Song Sinh (BAL+VN30) + KELLY + DT_10_25_25  ⭐ upgraded
REM    V12        = Am Duong (BAL+LAGGED) + TQ34b
REM    V121_ENS   = V12.1 + Ensemble (M1+M3r AND-HOLD) + TQ34b + BASE
REM    V121_Kelly = V121_ENS + Kelly NEUTRAL parking {3:1.0}

setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\papertrade_run_%TODAY%.log

cd /d "%WORKDIR%"

echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
echo Paper-trade daily run (5 systems + DT A/B) — %DATE% %TIME% >> "%LOGFILE%"
echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"

echo [0a] pull_us_market.py  (refresh US VIX/SPX -^> us_market_history.csv, Pillar B) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pull_us_market.py                                              >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0a2] rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat  (self-update v3.4b+DT4 state from BQ ticker, local only) >> "%LOGFILE%"
call rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat                                    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0/6] refresh_lagged_caches.py  (extend px/ov/surprise/events to latest BQ) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python refresh_lagged_caches.py                                       >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0b] snapshot_state_vintage.py  (accumulate point-in-time state vintage) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python snapshot_state_vintage.py                                      >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0c] macro_healthcheck.py  (DT5G feed health + fail-safe gate -^> data\macro_health.json) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python macro_healthcheck.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0d] publish_gated_state.py  (publish DT5G gated state -^> BQ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python deploy_golive_dt5g_v4\publish_gated_state.py                  >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [0e] golive_recommend.py  (V4 12.1 LAYER2 picks: BAL + VN30/LAGGED -^> out\golive_recommendations_DATE.csv, read by 18:00 report) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python deploy_golive_dt5g_v4\golive_recommend.py                    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

REM === Production base = DT4G + MACRO overlay (adopted 2026-05-29) ===
echo [1/4] pt_v11_tq34b.py        (V11 = Song Sinh + KELLY + DT4G+MACRO) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v11_tq34b.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [2/4] pt_v12_macro.py        (V12 = Am Duong: BAL+LAGGED + DT4G+MACRO) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v12_macro.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

REM Retired 2026-05-29 (DT4G+macro adopted as base): pt_v12_tq34b (old TQ34b base),
REM pt_v12_dt4 (DT-only shadow) -- both superseded by pt_v12_macro.

echo [3/4] pt_v121_ensemble.py    (V121_ENS: V12.1 + Ensemble + BASE + TQ34b*) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ensemble.py                                             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1
REM *ensemble still on TQ34b pending DT4G+macro integrated validation (research: DT hurts ensemble OOS)

echo [4/4] pt_v121_ens_q2.py      (V121_Kelly: V121_ENS + Kelly + TQ34b*) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v121_ens_q2.py                                               >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [4b] pt_v4_dt5g.py           (V4 12.1: V121_ENS + BASE on DT5G, fresh [REDACTED]01) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_v4_dt5g.py                                                   >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5] papertrade_compare.py    (system comparison)                 >> "%LOGFILE%"
python papertrade_compare.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5b] vol_spike_hedge_pt.py   (VOL-SPIKE HEDGE cho V5, paper-trade tam thoi -^> [REDACTED]30) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python vol_spike_hedge_pt.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5c] f_sleeve_pt.py          (F-SYSTEM standalone sleeve DT5G+Van, paper-trade -^> [REDACTED]30) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python f_sleeve_pt.py                                                  >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5d] orb_pt.py               (ORB intraday VN30F paper-trade live, tai dung tu bar 1m sau dong phien) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python orb_pt.py                                                       >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [7] pt_dt4_vs_tq34b_ab.py   (DT4 vs TQ34b foundation A/B, V1-V5, DECISION [REDACTED]30) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_dt4_vs_tq34b_ab.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [8] crisis_alert_push.py     (DT5G x 8L capitulation -^> Telegram push ONLY if WATCH/STRONG) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python crisis_alert_push.py                                           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [9] pt_capitulation_shadow.py (capitulation-overlay SHADOW sleeve, separate from V4/V5 books) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_capitulation_shadow.py                                      >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [10] fetch_bdi_daily.py      (forward-accumulate REAL Baltic Dry Index -^> data\bdi_daily_real.csv) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python fetch_bdi_daily.py                                             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [11] edge_health_monitor.py  (AMH#1: rolling-12M IC edge health + per-sector + capit-edge -^> data\edge_health_block.md) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python edge_health_monitor.py --refresh                               >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [12] ecology_dashboard.py    (AMH#4: breadth/dispersion/mood/divergence -^> data\ecology_now.md) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python ecology_dashboard.py --refresh                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [13] amh_cockpit.py          (V6 Tu Tru allocation + #1/#4 dashboards -^> data\amh_cockpit.md, read by 18:00 push) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python amh_cockpit.py                                                 >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [14] pt_sleeve_allocator.py  (FORWARD paper-trade V6 Tu Tru vs V5 -^> data\v6_vs_v5_paper.csv, go-live evidence) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python pt_sleeve_allocator.py                                         >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo Done %TIME%                                                       >> "%LOGFILE%"
endlocal

aiTitle: Investigate paper trading data lag in BigQuery

content.text:
Đúng, bạn quan sát chính xác — nhưng có hai nguyên nhân tách biệt, và phần lớn là **cố ý**:

## Ảnh chụp dữ liệu BQ ngay lúc này (VN 16:42, [REDACTED]09, đã đóng cửa phiên)

| Bảng | MAX(time) | Hôm nay? |
|---|---|---|
| `ticker_1m` (live screening) | **[REDACTED]09** | ✅ có |
| `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` (state) | **[REDACTED]09** | ✅ có |
| `ticker` (bảng feature/indicator chính) | **[REDACTED]08** | ❌ trễ 1 ngày |

## Vì sao paper-trade trễ 1 ngày

**1. Trễ "cố ý" — cap `today-1` (no look-ahead).**
`pt_dates.detect_end_date()` ([pt_dates.py:16](pt_dates.py:16)) trả về `min(today-1, ...)`. Nghĩa là kể cả khi BQ có dữ liệu hôm nay, paper-trade **vẫn luôn chốt sổ đến hôm-qua**. Đây là thiết kế đúng: hệ thống thực thi T+1 (mua/bán ở Open phiên sau), nên không được dùng giá đóng cửa của chính ngày tín hiệu → tránh look-ahead. `pt_v4_dt5g.py:47` lấy thẳng `END_DATE = detect_end_date()`.

**2. Trễ "thật" — bảng `ticker` ingest chậm 1 phiên.**
Paper-trade đọc tín hiệu/giá/Open/ETF từ `tav2_bq.ticker` (qua `SIGNAL_V11`, `opens_df`, `prices`, `m1/m3r`...). Bảng này lúc 16:42 hôm nay vẫn dừng ở 06-08, trong khi `ticker_1m` và bảng state đã có 06-09. Batch `papertrade_daily.bat` lại chạy lúc **15:30** (ngay sau đóng cửa 15:00), thời điểm `ticker` của ngày hôm nay gần như chắc chắn chưa được nạp.

## Kết luận

Hai yếu tố này **cộng dồn nhưng không độc lập**: ràng buộc thực tế = `min(today-1=06-08, ticker_max=06-08)` = **06-08**. Nên dù khắc phục được độ trễ ingest của `ticker`, paper-trade **vẫn sẽ chỉ tới hôm-qua** vì cap `today-1` là cố ý.

→ "Trễ 1 ngày" ở **NAV/giao dịch paper-trade là đúng và đúng theo thiết kế** (T+1, không look-ahead) — không phải lỗi.

Điều đáng lưu ý hơn: nếu bạn muốn **bảng `ticker` cũng có dữ liệu phiên hôm nay ngay sau đóng cửa** (để các script research/screening đọc `ticker` không bị lệch so với `ticker_1m`), thì đó mới là chỗ cần xử lý — pipeline nạp `ticker` đang chậm hơn `ticker_1m` đúng 1 phiên.

Bạn muốn tôi đào tiếp hướng nào: (a) xác minh pipeline nạp `ticker` để rút ngắn độ trễ ingest, hay (b) bạn chỉ cần xác nhận rằng độ trễ ở paper-trade là bình thường?

content: (a) xác minh pipeline nạp ticker để rút ngắn độ trễ ingest. theo tôi biết là thường sau 4:30 hoặc 5:00 chiều là bảng ticker sẽ có đủ, bạn kiểm tra lại xem

message.content: (a) xác minh pipeline nạp ticker để rút ngắn độ trễ ingest. theo tôi biết là thường sau 4:30 hoặc 5:00 chiều là bảng ticker sẽ có đủ, bạn kiểm tra lại xem

content.text: Tôi tìm pipeline nạp `tav2_bq.ticker` — script nào ghi/insert vào bảng đó và lịch chạy của nó.

content.text:
Các script ghi BQ trong repo chỉ ghi vào bảng **state phái sinh** (`vnindex_5state_*`), **không** ghi vào `ticker`. Nghĩa là pipeline nạp `ticker` nằm **ngoài** workspace này (ETL thượng nguồn của nhà cung cấp dữ liệu). 

Vậy tôi xác minh **bằng metadata BQ**: thời điểm các partition gần đây của `ticker` thực sự được ghi — để biết cadence nạp thật.

input.command:
export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/bin"
export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe"
echo "=== ticker: last 7 partitions, last_modified (VN time) ==="
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] 'SELECT partition_id, total_rows, DATETIME(last_modified_time, "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh") AS last_modified_vn FROM `[REDACTED].tav2_bq.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name="ticker" ORDER BY partition_id DESC LIMIT 7'
echo "=== ticker_1m: last 7 partitions ==="
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] 'SELECT partition_id, total_rows, DATETIME(last_modified_time, "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh") AS last_modified_vn FROM `[REDACTED].tav2_bq.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS` WHERE table_name="ticker_1m" ORDER BY partition_id DESC LIMIT 7'
input.description: Inspect partition last-modified times for ticker and ticker_1m

content.text:
Đây là bằng chứng quyết định — và nó **khác với giả định của bạn**. Để tôi trình bày rõ:

## Cadence nạp thật của `ticker` (theo metadata partition)

| Bảng | Partition mới nhất | total_rows | **Last modified (giờ VN)** |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ticker` | `202606` (data tới 06‑08) | 4,711 | **2026‑06‑08 lúc 22:39** |
| `ticker` | `202605` | 24,816 | 2026‑06‑04 lúc 22:38 |
| `ticker_1m` | `20260609` (có hôm nay) | 772 | 2026‑06‑09 lúc 16:41 |

## Phát hiện chính

**1. `ticker` KHÔNG nạp xong lúc 16:30–17:00. Nó nạp về đêm, ~22:30–22:40 VN.**
Partition tháng 6 của `ticker` (chứa data đến 06‑08) lần ghi cuối là **06‑08 lúc 22:39**. Partition tháng 5 ghi cuối **06‑04 lúc 22:38**. Hai mốc đều ~22:38–22:39 → cadence nạp là **ban đêm quanh 22:30–22:40**, không phải chiều. Ngay lúc này (16:43) data phiên 06‑09 **chưa** vào `ticker`; nó sẽ vào tối nay ~22:30+.

**2. Cái mà bạn thấy "có đủ sau 4:30–5:00 chiều" thực ra là `ticker_1m`, không phải `ticker`.**
`ticker_1m` được refresh liên tục trong ngày — mọi partition vừa ghi lúc **16:41 hôm nay** và đã có phiên 06‑09. Giả định "5 giờ chiều là đủ" khớp với `ticker_1m`, còn `ticker` thì trễ tới đêm.

**3. Pipeline nạp `ticker` nằm NGOÀI workspace này.**
Không có script nào trong repo ghi vào `tav2_bq.ticker` (mọi lệnh `bq load`/`to_gbq` ở đây chỉ ghi các bảng state phái sinh `vnindex_5state_*`). ETL nạp `ticker`/`ticker_1m`/`ticker_financial` là tiến trình thượng nguồn của nhà cung cấp dữ liệu — không kiểm soát/sửa được từ đây.

> Ghi chú phụ: `ticker` thực tế partition theo **THÁNG** (`partition_id=202606`), không phải DAY như CLAUDE.md ghi (`ticker_1m` mới là DAY: `20260609`). Mỗi lần nạp ngày mới, cả partition tháng bị ghi lại — đó là lý do partition tháng 5 bị "đụng" vào 06‑04 (loader reload cửa sổ trailing + tính lại adjusted Close).

## Hệ quả cho việc "rút ngắn độ trễ"

- **Không sửa được từ phía bạn**: cadence ~22:30 là do ETL thượng nguồn quyết định. Muốn `ticker` có phiên hôm nay sớm hơn thì phải tác động vào pipeline của nhà cung cấp.
- **Quan trọng**: dù `ticker` có nạp sớm thì paper‑trade **vẫn không đổi** — nó cap `today‑1` cố ý (T+1, no look‑ahead). Độ trễ ingest của `ticker` chỉ ảnh hưởng các **script research/screening đọc `ticker` ngay trong ngày**.
- **Giải pháp thực tế nếu cần dữ liệu phiên hôm nay sớm (≈16:40)**: cho các script đó đọc `ticker_1m` (đã có 06‑09 lúc 16:41) thay vì `ticker`, hoặc dời job chạy sau ~22:45 để `ticker` đã có data đêm.

Bạn muốn tôi (a) kiểm kê những script nào đang đọc `ticker` cho phiên-mới-nhất mà lẽ ra nên đọc `ticker_1m`, hay (b) xác minh thêm cadence 22:30 bằng cách theo dõi mốc last_modified qua vài đêm tới?

content: (a) kiểm kê những script nào đang đọc ticker cho phiên-mới-nhất mà lẽ ra nên đọc ticker_1m. làm bước này là tốt nhất

message.content: (a) kiểm kê những script nào đang đọc ticker cho phiên-mới-nhất mà lẽ ra nên đọc ticker_1m. làm bước này là tốt nhất

content.text: Đây là một audit có giá trị. Tôi sẽ khoanh vùng đúng: script **đọc `ticker` cho phiên mới nhất phục vụ live (screening/recommend/report)** — chứ không phải backtest/research (vốn cần full history nên phải dùng `ticker`). Tôi grep các pattern "lấy phiên mới nhất" trên `ticker` và tách live-consumer khỏi research.

file.content:
@echo off
REM 8L daily EOD orchestrator — refresh ranking + surprise-jump Telegram alert.
REM Schedule via Windows Task Scheduler ~17:45 on trading days (before the 18:00 V4 12.1 report, so rating_8l.csv is fresh for its R column).
REM Chain: rating_8l (credit-style quality 1-5 + top30 + buynow) -> unified_screener (merges rating) -> rank_8l -> dna_card (full-universe DNA cards for the bot) -> daily_alert -> cheap_pb_floor (rating x PB-floor x Ngu Hanh buy-now alert).
setlocal
set WORKDIR=/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude
set TODAY=%date:~10,4%-%date:~4,2%-%date:~7,2%
set LOGFILE=%WORKDIR%\data\pt_8l_daily_%TODAY%.log
set PATH=%PATH%;C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin
set CLOUDSDK_PYTHON=C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\platform\bundledpython\python.exe
cd /d "%WORKDIR%"

echo ==================================================== > "%LOGFILE%"
echo 8L daily ranking + alert — %DATE% %TIME% >> "%LOGFILE%"
echo ==================================================== >> "%LOGFILE%"

echo [1/5] rating_8l.py  (credit-style quality rating 1-5, 7 routes -^> rating_8l.csv + top30 + buynow) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python rating_8l.py           >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [2/5] unified_screener.py  (route + live valuation, 4 sector lenses, merges rating) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python unified_screener.py    >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [3/5] rank_8l.py  (composite score) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python rank_8l.py             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [4/6] dna_card.py  (full-universe DNA cards -^> dna_cards.csv, feeds bot 2-block DNA block) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python dna_card.py            >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [4b] vn30_8l.py  (deployable 8L-VN30 basket: liq^>=10B top-30 EW -^> data/vn30_8l.csv, bot "vn30") >> "%LOGFILE%"
python vn30_8l.py             >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [5/6] rank_8l_daily_alert.py  (top-30 surprise-jump -^> Telegram) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python rank_8l_daily_alert.py >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [6/7] cheap_pb_floor.py  (rating x PB-floor x Ngu Hanh buy-now -^> Telegram) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python cheap_pb_floor.py      >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo [7/7] snapshot rank_8l (dated, for bot "new"=mã mới vào top30 trong tuần) >> "%LOGFILE%"
python -c "import bot_8l_commands as b; print(b.snapshot_today())" >> "%LOGFILE%" 2>&1

echo Done %DATE% %TIME% >> "%LOGFILE%"
endlocal

input.prompt:
You are auditing Python scripts in `/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude` that query Google BigQuery table `tav2_bq.ticker`. 

CONTEXT (verified facts — trust these, do NOT re-verify):
- `tav2_bq.ticker` is the heavy daily feature table. It is ingested LATE — at night ~22:30 VN time. So a script reading it before ~22:30 gets data only up to YESTERDAY's session.
- `tav2_bq.ticker_1m` is a rolling snapshot of the SAME schema (superset: ticker columns + extended). It refreshes intraday and ALREADY has TODAY's session by ~16:40. It covers the full universe (1,252 tickers) but only a rolling window of the latest ~22 trading days (~1 month: 2026-05-11 → [REDACTED]09). content.text:
I have all 11 scripts read. Let me analyze each one's `tav2_bq.ticker` queries.

Key facts to apply: ticker_1m has the extended columns (Volume_3M_P50, Volume_1M, Trading_Value_1M_P50, MA200, PE, PB, PB_MA5Y, PB_SD5Y, ROE5Y, ROIC5Y, etc.), latest ~22 trading days, NO `PS`. It also has PE_MA5Y/PE_SD5Y, PB_MA5Y/PB_SD5Y per CLAUDE.md (these are joined financial cols in `ticker` and ticker_1m shares the schema). Let me verify which valuation-history columns each query needs vs. what ticker_1m has.

Now let me write the verdicts.

## Audit Results

| script | reads ticker latest-session? | history depth needed | cols missing in 1m | verdict | evidence (file:line + query snippet) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| rating_8l.py | Already reads `ticker_1m` | latest row only | — | **NA** (already 1m) | L52-63 `MAIN_SQL`: `WITH L AS (SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m) ... FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t, L WHERE t.time = L.mx`. Does not query `tav2_bq.ticker`. |
| unified_screener.py | Yes | latest + 365-day 52w-high window (>22d) | none required | **HYBRID** | L152-189: `latest AS (...MAX(t.time)... FROM tav2_bq.ticker t...)` + `hi AS (...t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY)... MAX(t.Close) hi52...)`. Latest-row cols (PE/PB/MA5Y/SD5Y/ROE5Y/Volume_3M_P50/Volume_1M/NP_P0/NP_P4) all in 1m. |
| dna_card.py | Yes | latest + 365-day 52w-high window (>22d) | none required | **HYBRID** | L71-77: `lt AS (...MAX(t.time)... FROM tav2_bq.ticker t...)` + `hiw AS (...t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY)... MAX(t.Close) hi...)`. Latest cols (ICB_Code,PE,PE_MA5Y,PE_SD5Y,PB*,ROE5Y,ROIC5Y,Volume_3M_P50,NP_P0/P4) all in 1m. |
| vn30_8l.py | Yes (latest per ticker) | latest row, but filters `time >= 2024-01-01` | none | **SWITCH** | L42-49: `latest AS (...t.Volume_3M_P50*COALESCE(t.Price,t.Close)... ROW_NUMBER() OVER(...ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE ...t.time >= DATE "2024-01-01") ... WHERE rn=1`. Only needs latest row; cols Volume_3M_P50, Price, Close all in 1m. |
| rank_8l.py | No (reads CSVs only) | — | — | **NA** | L23 reads `data/unified_screener.csv`; no BQ query at all. |
| rank_8l_daily_alert.py | No (reads CSVs only) | — | — | **NA** | L24/L30 read `rank_8l.csv` / `unified_screener.csv`; no BQ. |
| cheap_pb_floor.py | No (reads rating CSV; only BQ is the 5-state table) | — | — | **NA** | L61: `bq("SELECT state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live ...")`. Reads `rating_8l.csv` (L83) for stock data; never queries `tav2_bq.ticker`. |
| power_lens.py | Yes (latest per ticker) | latest row only (ICB_Code=7535 filter) | none | **SWITCH** | L23-36: `px AS (...ROW_NUMBER() OVER(...ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ICB_Code=7535...)` joined `WHERE ...px.rn=1`. Cols Close,Volume_3M_P50,Volume_1M,PB,PE,ICB_Code all in 1m. |
| bank_valuation_lens.py | Yes | latest + MBB historical fixed dates back to 2017 (>22d) | none required | **HYBRID** | L36-43 latest snapshot `FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest...`; L68-69 MBB query `t.time IN (DATE'2017-01-03',...'2026-05-29')`. Latest cols (PE,PB,PB_MA5Y,PB_SD5Y,ROE5Y,ROE_Min5Y,NP_P0/P4,Volume_3M_P50,ICB_Code) all in 1m. |
| qt_v4_valuation_lens.py | Yes | latest + 365-day 52w-high window (>22d) | none required | **HYBRID** | L42-48: `latest AS (...MAX(t.time)...)` + `hi AS (...t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY)...)`. Latest cols (PE,PE_MA5Y/SD5Y,PB*,NP_P0/P4,ROE5Y,Close,ICB_Code) all in 1m. |
| qt_v4_live_rank.py | No (stock data from pkl; only BQ is the 5-state table) | — | — | **KEEP** | L43: `bq("SELECT s.time,s.state FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live ...")`. Stock panel comes from `qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl` (L28), not `tav2_bq.ticker`. No fresh-session `ticker` read. |

## Per-SWITCH / HYBRID change notes

**vn30_8l.py — SWITCH.** In `_liquidity()` (L42-49), change the `latest` CTE's `FROM tav2_bq.ticker t` to `FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m t`. It only takes the latest row per ticker (`ROW_NUMBER() ... ORDER BY t.time DESC` then `WHERE rn=1`) and reads only `Volume_3M_P50`, `Price`, `Close` — all present in ticker_1m. The `t.time >= DATE "2024-01-01"` guard is harmless (1m's window is well inside it). This gives today's liquidity instead of yesterday's.

**power_lens.py — SWITCH.** In the `px` CTE (L25-26), change `FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ICB_Code=7535` to `FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m t WHERE t.ICB_Code=7535`. The CTE keeps only the latest row per ticker (`px.rn=1`, L36) and reads `Close, Volume_3M_P50, Volume_1M, PB, PE, ICB_Code` — all in 1m. The `f` CTE on `ticker_financial` (quarterly) is unaffected. Note the subquery on L31 (`SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker t2 WHERE t2.ICB_Code=7535`) can stay on `ticker` (ICB membership doesn't change with the 1-day lag) or also move to `ticker_1m`.

**unified_screener.py — HYBRID.** The main `val` query (L152-189) has two `ticker` reads: the `latest` CTE (latest-session valuation, L152) and the `hi` CTE (365-day 52-week-high, L153). Point only the `latest` CTE at `ticker_1m` (`MAX(t.time)` + the `SELECT t.PE,... FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest` on L177/188 → `tav2_bq.ticker_1m`) so today's PE/PB/dd/liquidity are fresh; keep the `hi` CTE on `ticker` since the 52w-high needs a full year of rows (unchanged by the lag). All latest-row columns it reads exist in 1m. (The `RATE_CYCLICAL` block L119-123 hits `ticker_financial`, not `ticker`, so it's unaffected.)

**dna_card.py — HYBRID.** The `snap` query (L71-77): point the `lt` CTE (latest snapshot, L71) at `ticker_1m` and the final `SELECT ... FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ...` (L77) at `tav2_bq.ticker_1m`; keep the `hiw` 365-day 52w-high CTE (L72) on `ticker`. All latest-row columns (ICB_Code, PE/PE_MA5Y/PE_SD5Y, PB/PB_MA5Y/PB_SD5Y, ROE5Y, ROIC5Y, NP_P0/P4, Volume_3M_P50) are in 1m. The quarterly `q` query (L79-80) is on `ticker_financial`, unaffected.

**bank_valuation_lens.py — HYBRID.** The latest-snapshot query (L36-43): the `banks`/`latest` CTEs and final `SELECT` can move to `tav2_bq.ticker_1m` (latest row only; cols PE, PB, PB_MA5Y, PB_SD5Y, ROE5Y, ROE_Min5Y, NP_P0/P4, Volume_3M_P50, ICB_Code all in 1m) to get today's PB/pb_z. Keep the MBB face-validity query (L68-69) on `ticker` — it pulls fixed historical dates back to 2017-01-03 that 1m's ~22-day window can't supply.

**qt_v4_valuation_lens.py — HYBRID.** Same shape as the screener: in the `df` query (L42-48) point the `latest` CTE (L42) and the final `SELECT ... FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest` (L48) at `ticker_1m`; keep the `hi` 365-day 52w-high CTE (L43) on `ticker`. Latest-row columns (PE, PE_MA5Y/SD5Y, PB/MA5Y/SD5Y, NP_P0/P4, ROE5Y, Close, ICB_Code) are all in 1m.

## Notes
- **rating_8l.py is already on ticker_1m** (the intended pattern) — its `MAIN_SQL` reads `ticker_1m` with `MAX(time)`. It's the reference implementation for the HYBRID/SWITCH changes above.
- **No script needs `PS`** from these latest-session queries, so the missing-`PS` constraint never forces a HYBRID here. The HYBRIDs are all driven by the deep-history side-CTE (365-day 52w-high, or MBB's multi-year fixed dates), not by a missing column.
- **rank_8l.py / rank_8l_daily_alert.py / cheap_pb_floor.py / qt_v4_live_rank.py do not read `tav2_bq.ticker` for stock data** — they consume upstream CSVs/pkl (rating_8l.csv, unified_screener.csv, qt_panel pkl). Their only BQ reads are the `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` state table (already a separate, fresh source). So freshness for these flows through the upstream producers (rating_8l.py already fresh; unified_screener.py becomes fresh once switched).

One consequence worth flagging: `cheap_pb_floor.py` and `rank_8l*.py` inherit their freshness from `rating_8l.py` and `unified_screener.py` respectively. rating_8l.py is already same-day, so cheap_pb_floor.py is already fed today's data; but rank_8l*.py stays one day stale until unified_screener.py's `latest` CTE is switched to ticker_1m.

ORDER BY t.time DESC` then `WHERE rn=1`) and reads only `Volume_3M_P50`, `Price`, `Close` — all present in ticker_1m. FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN lt ...` (L77) at `tav2_bq.ticker_1m`; keep the `hiw` 365-day 52w-high CTE (L72) on `ticker`. FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest` (L48) at `ticker_1m`; keep the `hi` 365-day 52w-high CTE (L43) on `ticker`. Latest-row columns (PE, PE_MA5Y/SD5Y, PB/MA5Y/SD5Y, NP_P0/P4, ROE5Y, Close, ICB_Code) are all in 1m.

- **rating_8l.py is already on ticker_1m** (the intended pattern) — its `MAIN_SQL` reads `ticker_1m` with `MAX(time)`. It's the reference implementation for the HYBRID/SWITCH changes above.

One consequence worth flagging: `cheap_pb_floor.py` and `rank_8l*.py` inherit their freshness from `rating_8l.py` and `unified_screener.py` respectively. rating_8l.py is already same-day, so cheap_pb_floor.py is already fed today's data; but rank_8l*.py stays one day stale until unified_screener.py's `latest` CTE is switched to ticker_1m.

aiTitle: Investigate paper trading data lag in BigQuery

content.text:
score_fa_lh.py is a full-history batch scorer: it joins every quarterly financial row since 2014-01-01 to ticker prices (90-day window before each quarter's release) to build `fa_ratings_lh.csv`. It is NOT latest-session-dependent — it processes the entire history to produce a ratings CSV. The ticker join is purely to attach a price near each historical quarter-end (for liquidity filtering). Verdict: KEEP (research/scoring over full history; ticker_1m's ~22-day window can't supply the price near old quarters).

I now have all the evidence. Let me compile the audit.

## Audit Results

| script | reads ticker latest-session? | history depth needed | cols missing in 1m | verdict | evidence (file:line + query snippet) |

content.content:
1	# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
2	"""Pure SQL constant for BA-system v11 signal (FA-tier integrated, SV_TIGHT embedded).
3	Extracted from sim_v11_for_analyzer.py SIGNAL_V11_UNIFIED. Point-in-time (as-of joins, no forward cols).
4	Use {start}/{end}. Output cols: ticker,time,Close,play_type,ta,liq,sec,days_since_release,state5.
5	"""
6	SIGNAL_V11 = """
7	WITH fa_dated AS (
8	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
9	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
10	  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
11	),
12	fin_dated AS (
13	  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
14	    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
15	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
16	),
17	latest_vni_max3m AS (
18	  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
19	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
20	  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
21	),
22	vni_history AS (
23	  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
24	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
25	  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
26	),
27	vni_max3m AS (
28	  SELECT time,
29	    MAX(D_RSI) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rsi_max3m
30	  FROM vni_history
31	),
32	ticker_data AS (
33	  -- ticker canonical
34	  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
35	         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
36	         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
37	         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
38	         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
39	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
40	  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
41	    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
42	    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
43	
44	  UNION ALL
45	
46	  -- ticker_1m fallback for dates where ticker has no D_RSI
47	  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
48	         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
49	         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
50	         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
51	         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
52	  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
53	  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
54	    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
55	    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
56	    AND NOT EXISTS (
57	      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
58	      WHERE t2.time = t.time AND t2.ticker = t.ticker AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
59	    )
60	),
61	classified AS (
62	  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
63	    (CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.50 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
64	    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA50 AND t.MA50 > t.MA200 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
65	    + CASE WHEN t.Volume >= t.Volume_3M_P50 * 1.3 AND t.Close > t.Close_T1 THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
66	    + CASE WHEN t.D_MACDdiff > 0 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
67	    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA20 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
68	    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.75 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
69	    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI < 0.30 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
70	    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE < t.PE_MA5Y - 0.5*t.PE_SD5Y THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
71	    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE > t.PE_MA5Y + 1.0*t.PE_SD5Y THEN -15 ELSE 0 END
72	    + CASE WHEN vmax.rsi_max3m > 0.65 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
73	    + CASE WHEN t.ID_HI_3Y <= 5 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
74	    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI_Max1W > 0.65 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
75	    + CASE WHEN t.FSCORE >= 8 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Pure SQL constant for BA-system v11 signal (FA-tier integrated, SV_TIGHT embedded).
Extracted from sim_v11_for_analyzer.py SIGNAL_V11_UNIFIED. Point-in-time (as-of joins, no forward cols).
Use {start}/{end}. Output cols: ticker,time,Close,play_type,ta,liq,sec,days_since_release,state5.
"""
SIGNAL_V11 = """
WITH fa_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
),
fin_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
),
latest_vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
),
vni_history AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
),
vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT time,
    MAX(D_RSI) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rsi_max3m
  FROM vni_history
),
ticker_data AS (
  -- ticker canonical
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  -- ticker_1m fallback for dates where ticker has no D_RSI
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
      WHERE t2.time = t.time AND t2.ticker = t.ticker AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    )
),
classified AS (
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
    (CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.50 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA50 AND t.MA50 > t.MA200 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Volume >= t.Volume_3M_P50 * 1.3 AND t.Close > t.Close_T1 THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_MACDdiff > 0 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA20 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.75 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI < 0.30 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE < t.PE_MA5Y - 0.5*t.PE_SD5Y THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE > t.PE_MA5Y + 1.0*t.PE_SD5Y THEN -15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN vmax.rsi_max3m > 0.65 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ID_HI_3Y <= 5 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI_Max1W > 0.65 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.FSCORE >= 8 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END

lastPrompt: (a) kiểm kê những script nào đang đọc ticker cho phiên-mới-nhất mà lẽ ra nên đọc ticker_1m. làm bước này là tốt nhất

aiTitle: Investigate paper trading data lag in BigQuery

content.text:
Đã xác minh. `signal_v11_sql.py`: panel cổ phiếu chính **đã có** fallback `ticker_1m` (UNION ALL, L44‑60), nhưng **hai CTE VNINDEX** — `latest_vni_max3m` (L17‑21) và `vni_history` (L22‑26) — vẫn đọc `ticker` thuần, **không** fallback → feature RSI của VNINDEX bị trễ 1 ngày cho **mọi** consumer của `SIGNAL_V11`.

Dưới đây là bản kiểm kê hợp nhất.

---

## Bối cảnh nhịp chạy (vì sao lệch)
- `ticker` nạp **đêm ~22:30**. Chuỗi live chạy **15:30 (golive) / 17:45 (8L) / 18:00 (report)** → đều đọc `ticker` của **hôm‑qua**, trong khi `ticker_1m` đã có **hôm nay** từ ~16:40.
- `ticker_1m` = full universe (1,252 mã), **22 phiên gần nhất**, đủ chỉ báo precomputed (thiếu `PS`).

## ✅ SWITCH — đổi thẳng sang `ticker_1m` (chỉ cần phiên mới nhất, ≤22 ngày, đủ cột; rủi ro thấp)

| Script | Query cần đổi | Ghi chú |
|---|---|---|
| **vn30_8l.py** | `latest` CTE L42‑49 `FROM tav2_bq.ticker`→`ticker_1m` | chỉ lấy `rn=1`; cột Volume_3M_P50/Price/Close |
| **power_lens.py** | `px` CTE L25‑26 →`ticker_1m` | lấy latest per ticker (ICB=7535) |
| **recommend_lh.py** | snapshot L66‑77 (cả `t1` và `t`) →`ticker_1m` | **docstring L19 đã ghi "ticker_1m" nhưng code đang đọc ticker** — sửa luôn cho khớp |
| **universe_scan.py** | L78 + 2 subquery `MAX(time)` L80/82 →`ticker_1m` | cửa sổ 7 ngày + `groupby.last()` |

## 🟡 HYBRID — latest‑row sang `ticker_1m`, **giữ** CTE lịch sử‑sâu trên `ticker`
Đa số bị trễ vì một CTE phụ tính **đỉnh 52 tuần / lịch sử nhiều năm** (cần cả năm dữ liệu — phần này không đổi theo độ trễ nên giữ nguyên trên `ticker`). Chỉ CTE snapshot phiên mới nhất cần chuyển.

| Script | Snapshot → 1m | Giữ trên `ticker` |
|---|---|---|
| **unified_screener.py** ⭐ | `latest` CTE L152 | `hi` 52w (365d) L153 |
| **dna_card.py** | `lt` CTE L71 | `hiw` 52w L72 |
| **dna_report.py** | `lt` CTE L131 | `hiw` 52w L133‑134 |
| **qt_v4_valuation_lens.py** | `latest` CTE L42 | `hi` 52w L43 |
| **bank_valuation_lens.py** | latest snapshot L36‑43 | MBB fixed‑dates 2017→ L68‑69 |
| **recommend_holistic.py** (+ `deploy_v11/`) | `VNI_OVERHEAT_QUERY` L385 (snapshot stock đã hybrid sẵn) | RSI history (đã UNION) |
| **golive_recommend.py** | overheat L86 + D1 RE_BACKLOG L70 | M3 2013→ L126, sector/VN30 static |
| **whitelist_monitor.py** | overlay Close hôm nay từ 1m | 500d MA200/peak L78‑86 |
| **quality_tactical_scanner.py** | main snapshot L65/76 | 52w‑high 400d L83‑93 |

## 🔑 Root‑cause dùng chung (đòn bẩy cao nhất)
- **signal_v11_sql.py** — VNINDEX CTE `latest_vni_max3m` (L17‑21) + `vni_history` (L22‑26) thêm fallback `ticker_1m`. Sửa 1 chỗ → fresh cho **mọi** consumer SIGNAL_V11 (golive, pt_v4_dt5g, recommend_holistic...). Panel cổ phiếu đã fallback rồi.

## ⚪ KEEP / NA — không cần đổi
- **Đã đọc `ticker_1m`/CSV** (không động tới): `rating_8l.py` (reference impl), `rank_8l.py`, `rank_8l_daily_alert.py`, `cheap_pb_floor.py`, `crisis_alert_push.py`, `crisis_capitulation_signal.py`, `telegram_recommend.py`.
- **Full‑history hợp lệ** (backtest/training/research, dùng `ticker_prune`): `score_fa_lh.py`, `score_live_signals.py`, `ecology_dashboard.py`, `edge_health_monitor.py`, `qt_v4_live_rank.py`, `recommend_tomorrow.py` (scoring chính đã ở `ticker_1m`; chỉ universe 2020‑25 tĩnh đọc ticker).
- **VNINDEX attribution, trễ 1 ngày vô hại** (đổi được nhưng không bắt buộc): `sbv_macro_tracker.py`, `bull_div_boost_tracker.py`, `ngu_hanh_shadow_tracker.py`.

---

## Thứ tự ưu tiên đề xuất (theo đòn bẩy × rủi ro)
1. **signal_v11_sql.py** (VNINDEX CTE) — 1 sửa, lan tỏa toàn bộ chuỗi SIGNAL_V11.
2. **unified_screener.py** `latest` CTE — cổng freshness của cả 8L daily chain (kéo theo rank_8l → daily_alert → bot).
3. **dna_card.py + dna_report.py** — feed bot DNA + block NOW 18:00 + crisis alert.
4. 4 script **SWITCH** sạch (vn30_8l, power_lens, recommend_lh, universe_scan) — mechanical, an toàn.
5. Còn lại theo nhu cầu.

Tất cả đều là **đổi tên bảng ở CTE snapshot phiên‑mới‑nhất** (giữ nguyên CTE lịch sử). Bạn muốn tôi **áp dụng theo thứ tự ưu tiên trên** (bắt đầu từ #1–#4), hay chỉ làm nhóm SWITCH sạch trước để bạn review diff nhỏ?
Áp dụng #1–#4. Tôi đọc chính xác các đoạn cần sửa ở từng file trước.

file.content:
def _liquidity(tickers):
    """Latest real daily liquidity (B VND/day) per ticker = Volume_3M_P50 * unadjusted Price."""
    inlist = ",".join(f'"{t}"' for t in tickers)
    sql = f"""
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT t.ticker, t.Volume_3M_P50 * COALESCE(t.Price, t.Close)/1e9 AS liq,
             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
      FROM tav2_bq.ticker t
      WHERE t.ticker IN ({inlist}) AND t.time >= DATE "2024-01-01"
    )
    SELECT ticker, ROUND(liq,2) AS liq FROM latest WHERE rn=1"""
    return _bq(sql)

def build():
    rank = pd.read_csv(RANK_CSV)
    liq = _liquidity(rank["ticker"].tolist())
    m = rank.merge(liq, on="ticker", how="left")
    m["liq"] = m["liq"].fillna(m.get("liqB"))      # BQ liquidity primary; rank's liqB as fallback
    elig = m[m["liq"] >= LIQ_FLOOR].sort_values("rank").head(N).copy()

print(f"  {len(FEATURES)} features loaded")

# ── FETCH LATEST BQ DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("Fetching latest universe data from BQ ...")
sql = """
SELECT
    t.ticker, t.time,
    t.Close, t.Open,
    t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff, t.D_CMF,
    t.MA10, t.MA50, t.MA200,
    t.PE, t.PB, t.PCF,
    t.ROE5Y, t.ROE_Min3Y, t.ROE_Min5Y,
    t.ROIC5Y, t.ROIC_Min3Y,
    t.FSCORE,
    t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4,
    t.CF_OA_5Y, t.OShares,
    t.Risk_Rating,
    t.HI_3M_T1, t.LO_3M_T1,
    t.D_RSI_Max3M, t.D_RSI_Max1W, t.D_RSI_T1W,
    t.Volume, t.Volume_1M, t.Volume_3M_P50,
    t.C_L1W, t.VAP1M, t.VAP3M,
    t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.PB_MA5Y, t.PB_SD5Y,
    t.Sup_1Y, t.Res_1Y,
    t.ICB_Code
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.time >= DATE_SUB(
        (SELECT MAX(t2.time) FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2),
        INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  AND t.time <= (SELECT MAX(t2.time) FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2)
  AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.ticker, t.time DESC
"""
df = bq_query(sql, "universe")
if df is None or df.empty:
    raise RuntimeError("No BQ data returned")

df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
df = df.sort_values("time").groupby("ticker").last().reset_index()
latest_date = df["time"].max().date()
print(f"  {len(df):,} tickers | latest date: {latest_date}")

content.text:
Tất cả cột đều có trong `ticker_1m`. Áp dụng các sửa đổi.

**#1 — signal_v11_sql.py** (root-cause dùng chung — thêm fallback `ticker_1m` cho VNINDEX):

input.old_string:
latest_vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
),
vni_history AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
),
input.new_string:
vni_src AS (
  -- VNINDEX RSI: canonical `ticker` history + `ticker_1m` fallback for the freshest
  -- sessions not yet in `ticker` (ticker ingests ~22:30 VN; ticker_1m is intraday-fresh).
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
      WHERE t2.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t2.time = t.time AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    )
),
latest_vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
  FROM vni_src AS t
  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
),
vni_history AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM vni_src AS t
),

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Pure SQL constant for BA-system v11 signal (FA-tier integrated, SV_TIGHT embedded).
Extracted from sim_v11_for_analyzer.py SIGNAL_V11_UNIFIED. Point-in-time (as-of joins, no forward cols).
Use {start}/{end}. Output cols: ticker,time,Close,play_type,ta,liq,sec,days_since_release,state5.
"""
SIGNAL_V11 = """
WITH fa_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
),
fin_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
),
latest_vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
),
vni_history AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
),
vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT time,
    MAX(D_RSI) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rsi_max3m
  FROM vni_history
),
ticker_data AS (
  -- ticker canonical
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  -- ticker_1m fallback for dates where ticker has no D_RSI
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
      WHERE t2.time = t.time AND t2.ticker = t.ticker AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    )
),
classified AS (
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
    (CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.50 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA50 AND t.MA50 > t.MA200 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Volume >= t.Volume_3M_P50 * 1.3 AND t.Close > t.Close_T1 THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_MACDdiff > 0 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA20 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.75 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI < 0.30 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE < t.PE_MA5Y - 0.5*t.PE_SD5Y THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE > t.PE_MA5Y + 1.0*t.PE_SD5Y THEN -15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN vmax.rsi_max3m > 0.65 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ID_HI_3Y <= 5 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI_Max1W > 0.65 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.FSCORE >= 8 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P4 * 1.5 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 < t.NP_P4 * 0.7 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN -8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (8,9) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (4,7) THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 * 1.005 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 < t.MA50_T1 THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.HI_3M_T1 > 0 AND t.Close / t.HI_3M_T1 < 0.85 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P1 * 1.2 AND t.NP_P1 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64)=8 AND fa.fa_tier='D' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64)=8 AND fa.fa_tier='A' THEN -10 ELSE 0 END) AS ta,
    s5_ff.state AS state5, fa.fa_tier,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4) - 1 AS np_yoy,
    fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,
    (t.PE - t.PE_MA5Y) / NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y, 0) AS pe_z,
    (t.D_RSI > 0.90 OR (t.MA20 > 0 AND t.Close / t.MA20 > 1.25)) AS warn_ext,
    t.Volume_3M_P50 * COALESCE(t.Price, t.Close) AS liq,   -- real (unadjusted) traded notional, not back-adjusted Close
    CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS sec,
    rel.days_since_release
  FROM ticker_data AS t
  LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa
    ON fa.ticker = t.ticker AND t.time >= fa.f_time
   AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time < fa.next_f_time)
  LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin
    ON fin.ticker = t.ticker AND t.time >= fin.fin_time
   AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time < fin.next_fin_time)
  LEFT JOIN vni_max3m AS vmax ON vmax.time = t.time
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT t2.time, ARRAY_AGG(s.state ORDER BY s.time DESC LIMIT 1)[OFFSET(0)] AS state
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT time FROM ticker_data) AS t2
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s ON s.time <= t2.time
    GROUP BY t2.time
  ) AS s5_ff ON s5_ff.time = t.time
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT t2.ticker, t2.time,
      DATE_DIFF(t2.time, MAX(tf.Release_Date), DAY) AS days_since_release
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker, time FROM ticker_data) AS t2
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS tf
      ON tf.ticker = t2.ticker AND tf.Release_Date <= t2.time
    GROUP BY t2.ticker, t2.time
  ) AS rel ON rel.ticker = t.ticker AND rel.time = t.time
)
SELECT ticker, time, Close,
  CASE
    WHEN state5 IN (1, 2) THEN 'AVOID_bear'
    WHEN fa_tier = 'E' THEN 'AVOID_faE'
    -- V11 SV_TIGHT Fresh-Q: state 4-5 (BULL) no filter; state 3 (NEUTRAL) ≤60d
    -- State 1 (CRISIS) ≤30d but blocked anyway via AVOID_bear
    WHEN ta >= 170 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('C','D') THEN 'MEGA'
    WHEN ta >= 170 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'S_PRO'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('C','D') THEN 'MOMENTUM'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('A','B') THEN 'MOMENTUM_QUALITY'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 = 3 AND fa_tier IN ('C','D')
         AND days_since_release IS NOT NULL AND days_since_release <= 60 THEN 'MOMENTUM_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND pe_z < -0.5 AND ta >= 95 AND state5 IN (3,4,5) AND NOT warn_ext THEN 'COMPOUNDER_BUY'
    WHEN fa_tier = 'C' AND ta >= 100 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND ((np_yoy > 0.20) OR (rev_yoy > 0.20)) THEN 'DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY'
    WHEN ta >= 140 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_S'
    WHEN ta >= 125 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_A'
    WHEN ta >= 140 AND state5 = 3 THEN 'MOMENTUM_S_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND ta >= 70 AND ta < 130 THEN 'COMPOUNDER_HOLD'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') THEN 'WAIT'
    ELSE 'PASS'
  END AS play_type,
  ta, liq, sec, days_since_release, state5
FROM classified WHERE liq >= 1e9
"""

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""vn30_8l.py — build the deployable "8L-VN30" basket and cache it for the Telegram bot.

The 8L composite ranking (data/rank_8l.csv) tilts to quality but its top names are mostly
illiquid; this carves out an INVESTABLE 30-stock basket = the highest-8L-score names that
clear a real liquidity floor (>=10B VND/day), equal-weighted, quarterly-rebalanced.

Backtest (backtest_8l_vn30.py, 2014-2026): vs VN30 the edge is DEFENSIVE (MaxDD ~10pp shallower,
higher Calmar) not return alpha; the real lever is the DT5G market gate, applied at display time.
30 names is the size sweet-spot (20 is worse — quality is a broad defensive tilt, not top-N alpha).

Run EOD in pt_8l_daily.bat (after rank_8l.py). Output: data/vn30_8l.csv.
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import os, sys, subprocess
from io import StringIO
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import pandas as pd

WORKDIR = os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
RANK_CSV = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "rank_8l.csv")
OUT_CSV = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", "vn30_8l.csv")
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
LIQ_FLOOR = 10.0     # billion VND/day
N = 30

def _bq(sql):
    import tempfile
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile("w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); p = f.name
    try:
        cmd = f'bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=5000 < "{p}"'
        out = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, check=True, shell=True)
    finally:
        os.unlink(p)
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(out.stdout))

def _liquidity(tickers):
    """Latest real daily liquidity (B VND/day) per ticker = Volume_3M_P50 * unadjusted Price."""
    inlist = ",".join(f'"{t}"' for t in tickers)
    sql = f"""
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT t.ticker, t.Volume_3M_P50 * COALESCE(t.Price, t.Close)/1e9 AS liq,
             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
      FROM tav2_bq.ticker t
      WHERE t.ticker IN ({inlist}) AND t.time >= DATE "2024-01-01"
    )
    SELECT ticker, ROUND(liq,2) AS liq FROM latest WHERE rn=1"""
    return _bq(sql)

def build():
    rank = pd.read_csv(RANK_CSV)
    liq = _liquidity(rank["ticker"].tolist())
    m = rank.merge(liq, on="ticker", how="left")
    m["liq"] = m["liq"].fillna(m.get("liqB"))      # BQ liquidity primary; rank's liqB as fallback
    elig = m[m["liq"] >= LIQ_FLOOR].sort_values("rank").head(N).copy()
    elig["weight"] = 1.0 / len(elig)
    elig["basket_rank"] = range(1, len(elig) + 1)
    cols = ["basket_rank", "ticker", "route", "score", "verdict", "liq", "weight"]
    elig[cols].to_csv(OUT_CSV, index=False)
    return elig[cols]

def main():
    df = build()
    print(f"8L-VN30 basket — {len(df)} names, EW {100/len(df):.2f}%/name, liq>={LIQ_FLOOR:.0f}B/day")
    print(df.to_string(index=False))
    print(f"\nSaved {OUT_CSV}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""power_lens.py — sector lens for POWER (ICB 7535, hydro/thermal): the debt-paydown LIFECYCLE.
Validated (power_lifecycle_ic.py): a power plant = levered infra annuity. PRE-INFLECTION (debt high
BUT FALLING + CFO covering) + cheap PB = the golden buy (2Y +53%/win89% at PB<1.0); debt-free=mature/yield
(re-rated); debt-rising-or-CFO-negative = distress. Generic FA misfires (high debt/neg EPS/neg IntCov early).
Routes ICB 7535 to this lens (like bank_lens). Output: data/power_lens.{md,csv}."""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=os.environ.get("WORKDIR_8L", r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude")
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ=os.environ.get("BQ_BIN", (r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd" if os.name=="nt" else "bq"))
def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'{"type" if os.name=="nt" else "cat"} "{tmp}" | "{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=300,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

d=bq("""
WITH px AS (SELECT t.ticker, t.Close, t.Volume_3M_P50, t.Volume_1M, t.PB, t.PE,
   ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
   FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ICB_Code=7535 AND t.Close IS NOT NULL),
f AS (SELECT x.ticker, x.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 deq, x.STLTDebt_Eq_P4 deq4,
   (x.CF_OA_P0+x.CF_OA_P1+x.CF_OA_P2+x.CF_OA_P3) cfo_ttm,
   x.NP_P0+x.NP_P1+x.NP_P2+x.NP_P3 np_ttm, x.ROE_Trailing roe, x.IntCov_P0 intcov, x.Revenue_YoY_P0 rev_yoy,
   ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY x.ticker ORDER BY x.time DESC) rn
   FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial x WHERE x.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker t2 WHERE t2.ICB_Code=7535))
SELECT f.ticker, ROUND(f.deq,3) deq, ROUND(f.deq4,3) deq4, ROUND(f.cfo_ttm/1e9,1) cfo_ttm_bn,
  ROUND(f.np_ttm/1e9,1) np_ttm_bn, ROUND(f.roe*100,1) roe, ROUND(px.PB,2) pb, ROUND(px.PE,1) pe,
  ROUND(f.rev_yoy,3) rev_yoy,
  ROUND(GREATEST(px.Volume_3M_P50,px.Volume_1M)*px.Close/1e9,2) liqB, ROUND(px.Close,0) close
FROM f JOIN px ON px.ticker=f.ticker AND px.rn=1 WHERE f.rn=1""")

# hydro names (rainfall-driven) — hydrology cycle overlay applies only to these, not thermal (fuel/PPA)
HYDRO={"VSH","CHP","SHP","SJD","TBC","TMP","SBA","DRL","GHC","HNA","SEB","S4A","AVC","ISH","SBH","HJS",
       "VPD","DNH","HPD","BHA","NTH","QPH","GSM","SP2","TTE","NED","BSA","BHA","DNC","HIO","UIC","ND2"}

def classify(r):
    deq,deq4,cfo,pb,roe=r["deq"],r["deq4"],r["cfo_ttm_bn"],r["pb"],r["roe"]
    falling=pd.notna(deq4) and pd.notna(deq) and deq<deq4
    cfo_pos=pd.notna(cfo) and cfo>0
    cheap=pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2
    if pd.isna(deq): return ("UNKNOWN","WATCH","no debt data")
    # debt-free mature: re-rated annuity → yield/hold (QTP-type)
    if deq<0.3:
        v="MATURE_YIELD"; act="HOLD/yield" if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else "WATCH"
        return (v,act,f"debt-free (D/E {deq}) ROE{roe:.0f}% PB{pb} → re-rated annuity, dividend play")
    # meaningful debt
    if deq>=0.7 and falling and cfo_pos:
        if pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.0: v="PRE_INFLECTION_CHEAP"; act="BUY-zone"     # validated 2Y +53%/win89%
        elif cheap: v="PRE_INFLECTION"; act="BUY-zone"
        else: v="PRE_INFLECTION_RICH"; act="ACCUMULATE/watch"
        return (v,act,f"D/E {deq}↓(from {deq4}) CFO+{cfo:.0f}bn covering → debt retiring, earnings-surge ahead; PB{pb} ROE{roe:.0f}%")
    if deq>=0.7 and not (falling and cfo_pos):
        why="debt NOT falling" if not falling else "CFO not covering"
        return ("DEBT_STRESS","AVOID-new (verify)",f"D/E {deq} high & {why} (cfo {cfo}) → distress risk not pre-inflection ⚠")
    # mid (0.3-0.7)
    if cheap: return ("MID_CYCLE","ACCUMULATE/watch",f"D/E {deq} mid, PB{pb} cheap ROE{roe:.0f}%")
    return ("MID_CYCLE","WATCH",f"D/E {deq} mid, PB{pb} ROE{roe:.0f}%")

res=d.apply(lambda r: pd.Series(classify(r),index=["verdict","action","detail"]),axis=1)
out=d.join(res)
# overlays: HYDROLOGY cycle (hydro only — validated: confirmed wet-recovery > blind-drought; drought works if also cheap)
# + LIQUIDITY caveat (user: hydro low-liq limits deployability)
def tags(r):
    t=[]
    if r["ticker"] in HYDRO and pd.notna(r["rev_yoy"]):
        ry=r["rev_yoy"]
        if ry>0.15: t.append(f"🌧 wet-recovery tailwind (rev{ry*100:+.0f}% YoY → output up)")
        elif ry<-0.15:
            t.append(f"☀ drought (rev{ry*100:+.0f}%)"+(" + cheap → contrarian-buy" if (pd.notna(r["pb"]) and r["pb"]<1.2) else " — watch, not cheap yet"))
    if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) and r["liqB"]<1: t.append(f"⚠ low-liq {r['liqB']:.1f}B (deployability limited)")
    return " | ".join(t)
out["detail"]=out.apply(lambda r: r["detail"]+(" | "+tags(r) if tags(r) else ""),axis=1)
rank={"BUY-zone":0,"ACCUMULATE/watch":1,"HOLD/yield":2,"WATCH":3,"AVOID-new (verify)":4}
out["ar"]=out["action"].map(rank).fillna(5); out=out.sort_values(["ar","deq"])
out.drop(columns=["ar"]).to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.csv"),index=False)
lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# Power lens (ICB 7535) — debt-paydown lifecycle")
P(f"universe {len(out)} | validated: PRE-INFLECTION+cheap = 2Y +53%/win89%; debt-free=mature/yield; debt-rising/CFO-neg=distress")
P("")
P(f"{'tkr':<6}{'verdict':<22}{'action':<20}{'liqB':>6}  detail")
for _,r in out.iterrows():
    P(f"{r['ticker']:<6}{r['verdict']:<22}{r['action']:<20}{(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.1f}  {r['detail']}")
P("")
P("BUY-zone (pre-inflection): "+(", ".join(out[out.action=='BUY-zone']['ticker']) or "none"))
P("Caveat: hydro=hydrology/drought risk, thermal=fuel/PPA; asset-life (hydro~40-50y, thermal~25-30y) not in BQ; verify CFO genuinely retires debt (not refinancing).")
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","power_lens.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/power_lens.{md,csv}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
recommend_lh.py
===============
Live LH-system picks: top FA-LH A+B tier names from latest available quarter,
filtered by CRISIS gate (skip when state=1).

Usage:
  python recommend_lh.py              # uses latest data
  python recommend_lh.py 2026-05-14   # snapshot at specific date

Output:
  - `lh_picks_<date>.csv` — ranked top picks for next quarterly cohort buy
  - Console summary with state-gate verdict

Inputs:
  - fa_ratings_lh.csv (generated by score_fa_lh.py)
  - vnindex_5state.csv
  - tav2_bq.ticker_1m for fresh liquidity / price snapshot
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, subprocess, tempfile
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
from io import StringIO
import pandas as pd, numpy as np

PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"
BQ_BIN = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
TARGET_POSITIONS = 10           # total target portfolio size
HOLD_QUARTERS = 4               # 1Y hold per position
TIERS = ("A", "B")              # eligible tiers

def bq_query(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".sql", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(sql); tmp = f.name
    try:
        cmd = f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000'
        r = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=600, shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    if r.returncode != 0: raise RuntimeError(f"{r.stderr[:500]}")
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

snap_dt = pd.Timestamp(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else pd.Timestamp.today().normalize()
print(f"LH picks @ {snap_dt.date()}")

# 1) Load ratings
ratings = pd.read_csv("fa_ratings_lh.csv", parse_dates=["time", "Release_Date"])
latest_q = ratings.sort_values("quarter").iloc[-1]["quarter"]
print(f"Latest quarter in fa_ratings_lh: {latest_q}")

# 2) Check CRISIS gate (today's state)
state_df = pd.read_csv("vnindex_5state.csv", parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
recent_state = state_df[state_df["time"] <= snap_dt].iloc[-1]
print(f"Current 5-state regime: state={recent_state['state']} (1=CRISIS, 2=BEAR, 3=NEU, 4=BULL, 5=EX-BULL) @ {recent_state['time'].date()}")
if recent_state["state"] == 1:
    print("\n🔴 CRISIS GATE FIRED — skip new buys today. Existing positions hold until expiry.")
    print("   Re-run when state transitions out of CRISIS (state ≥ 2).")
    sys.exit(0)
else:
    print(f"  Gate OK — proceed with picks.\n")

# 3) Pull fresh live snapshot from ticker (most recent available row per ticker)
live = bq_query(f"""
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT t1.ticker AS tk, MAX(t1.time) AS time FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t1
  WHERE t1.time <= "{snap_dt.date()}" AND t1.time >= DATE_SUB("{snap_dt.date()}", INTERVAL 90 DAY)
  GROUP BY t1.ticker
)
SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Volume_3M_P50,
       t.Volume_3M_P50 * t.Close AS liq_vnd
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
JOIN latest AS l ON l.tk = t.ticker AND l.time = t.time
WHERE t.Close > 0 AND t.Volume_3M_P50 IS NOT NULL
""")
print(f"  Live universe: {len(live)} tickers")

# 4) Filter latest-Q ratings to A+B with liquidity ≥ 1B/day
latest_picks = ratings[(ratings["quarter"] == latest_q) & (ratings["tier"].isin(TIERS))].copy()
print(f"  A+B picks for {latest_q}: {len(latest_picks)}")
latest_picks = latest_picks.merge(live[["ticker", "Close", "liq_vnd"]], on="ticker", how="inner",
                                    suffixes=("_q", "_now"))
print(f"  Joined with live data: {len(latest_picks)}")
latest_picks = latest_picks[latest_picks["liq_vnd"] >= 1e9]
print(f"  Post liquidity filter (≥1B VND/day): {len(latest_picks)}")

# 5) Sort by score desc, take top N (more than target, allow operator to choose)
top_picks = latest_picks.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(TARGET_POSITIONS * 2)

# 6) Output
out = top_picks[["ticker", "quarter", "sub", "ICB_Code", "tier", "score", "pct",
                 "Close_q", "Close_now", "liq_vnd", "Release_Date"]].copy()
out["Close_change"] = (out["Close_now"] / out["Close_q"] - 1).round(4)
out["liq_bil"] = (out["liq_vnd"] / 1e9).round(2)
out["score"] = out["score"].round(3)
out["pct"] = out["pct"].round(3)
out = out.drop(columns=["liq_vnd", "Close_q", "Close_now"])
out.to_csv(f"lh_picks_{snap_dt.date()}.csv", index=False)

print("\n" + "="*100)
print(f"TOP {TARGET_POSITIONS} LH PICKS — buy {TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS}-{TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS + 1} this rebal, hold 1Y")
print("="*100)
print(out.head(TARGET_POSITIONS).to_string(index=False))
print(f"\nFull top {len(out)} written to lh_picks_{snap_dt.date()}.csv")
print(f"Buy approx {TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS}-{TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS + 1} new this quarter (staggered cohort) — pick from rows where ticker NOT in current portfolio")

latest_picks = ratings[(ratings["quarter"] == latest_q) & (ratings["tier"].isin(TIERS))].copy()
print(f"  A+B picks for {latest_q}: {len(latest_picks)}")
latest_picks = latest_picks.merge(live[["ticker", "Close", "liq_vnd"]], on="ticker", how="inner",
                                    suffixes=("_q", "_now"))
print(f"  Joined with live data: {len(latest_picks)}")
latest_picks = latest_picks[latest_picks["liq_vnd"] >= 1e9]
print(f"  Post liquidity filter (≥1B VND/day): {len(latest_picks)}")

# 5) Sort by score desc, take top N (more than target, allow operator to choose)
top_picks = latest_picks.sort_values("score", ascending=False).head(TARGET_POSITIONS * 2)

# 6) Output
out = top_picks[["ticker", "quarter", "sub", "ICB_Code", "tier", "score", "pct",
                 "Close_q", "Close_now", "liq_vnd", "Release_Date"]].copy()
out["Close_change"] = (out["Close_now"] / out["Close_q"] - 1).round(4)
out["liq_bil"] = (out["liq_vnd"] / 1e9).round(2)
out["score"] = out["score"].round(3)
out["pct"] = out["pct"].round(3)
out = out.drop(columns=["liq_vnd", "Close_q", "Close_now"])
out.to_csv(f"lh_picks_{snap_dt.date()}.csv", index=False)

print("\n" + "="*100)
print(f"TOP {TARGET_POSITIONS} LH PICKS — buy {TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS}-{TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS + 1} this rebal, hold 1Y")
print("="*100)
print(out.head(TARGET_POSITIONS).to_string(index=False))
print(f"\nFull top {len(out)} written to lh_picks_{snap_dt.date()}.csv")
print(f"Buy approx {TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS}-{TARGET_POSITIONS // HOLD_QUARTERS + 1} new this quarter (staggered cohort) — pick from rows where ticker NOT in current portfolio")

  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1

),

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Pure SQL constant for BA-system v11 signal (FA-tier integrated, SV_TIGHT embedded).
Extracted from sim_v11_for_analyzer.py SIGNAL_V11_UNIFIED. Point-in-time (as-of joins, no forward cols).
Use {start}/{end}. Output cols: ticker,time,Close,play_type,ta,liq,sec,days_since_release,state5.
"""
SIGNAL_V11 = """
WITH fa_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS f_time, f.tier AS fa_tier,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_f_time
  FROM tav2_bq.fa_ratings AS f
),
fin_dated AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time AS fin_time, f.Revenue_YoY_P0,
    LEAD(f.time) OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time) AS next_fin_time
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS f
),
vni_src AS (
  -- VNINDEX RSI: canonical `ticker` history + `ticker_1m` fallback for the freshest
  -- sessions not yet in `ticker` (ticker ingests ~22:30 VN; ticker_1m is intraday-fresh).
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
  WHERE t.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
      WHERE t2.ticker = 'VNINDEX' AND t2.time = t.time AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    )
),
latest_vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT t.D_RSI AS rsi_latest
  FROM vni_src AS t
  ORDER BY t.time DESC LIMIT 1
),
vni_history AS (
  SELECT t.time, t.D_RSI
  FROM vni_src AS t
),
vni_max3m AS (
  SELECT time,
    MAX(D_RSI) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rsi_max3m
  FROM vni_history
),
ticker_data AS (
  -- ticker canonical
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  -- ticker_1m fallback for dates where ticker has no D_RSI
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close, t.Price, t.Volume, t.D_RSI, t.D_MACDdiff,
         t.MA20, t.MA50, t.MA200, t.MA50_T1, t.Close_T1,
         t.HI_3M_T1, t.ID_HI_3Y, t.D_RSI_Max1W,
         t.PE, t.PE_MA5Y, t.PE_SD5Y, t.FSCORE,
         t.NP_P0, t.NP_P1, t.NP_P4, t.ICB_Code, t.Volume_3M_P50
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_1m AS t
  WHERE t.time BETWEEN DATE '{start}' AND DATE '{end}'
    AND t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
    AND t.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t2
      WHERE t2.time = t.time AND t2.ticker = t.ticker AND t2.D_RSI IS NOT NULL
    )
),
classified AS (
  SELECT t.ticker, t.time, t.Close,
    (CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.50 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA50 AND t.MA50 > t.MA200 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Volume >= t.Volume_3M_P50 * 1.3 AND t.Close > t.Close_T1 THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_MACDdiff > 0 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.Close > t.MA20 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI > 0.75 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI < 0.30 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE < t.PE_MA5Y - 0.5*t.PE_SD5Y THEN 15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.PE > 0 AND t.PE_MA5Y > 0 AND t.PE > t.PE_MA5Y + 1.0*t.PE_SD5Y THEN -15 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN vmax.rsi_max3m > 0.65 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ID_HI_3Y <= 5 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.D_RSI_Max1W > 0.65 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.FSCORE >= 8 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P4 * 1.5 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 < t.NP_P4 * 0.7 AND t.NP_P4 > 0 THEN -8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (8,9) THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.ICB_Code IS NOT NULL AND CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) IN (4,7) THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 > t.MA50_T1 * 1.005 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.MA50_T1 > 0 AND t.MA50 < t.MA50_T1 THEN -5 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.HI_3M_T1 > 0 AND t.Close / t.HI_3M_T1 < 0.85 THEN -10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN t.NP_P0 > t.NP_P1 * 1.2 AND t.NP_P1 > 0 THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64)=8 AND fa.fa_tier='D' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64)=8 AND fa.fa_tier='A' THEN -10 ELSE 0 END) AS ta,
    s5_ff.state AS state5, fa.fa_tier,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0, t.NP_P4) - 1 AS np_yoy,
    fin.Revenue_YoY_P0 AS rev_yoy,
    (t.PE - t.PE_MA5Y) / NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y, 0) AS pe_z,
    (t.D_RSI > 0.90 OR (t.MA20 > 0 AND t.Close / t.MA20 > 1.25)) AS warn_ext,
    t.Volume_3M_P50 * COALESCE(t.Price, t.Close) AS liq,   -- real (unadjusted) traded notional, not back-adjusted Close
    CAST(FLOOR(t.ICB_Code/1000) AS INT64) AS sec,
    rel.days_since_release
  FROM ticker_data AS t
  LEFT JOIN fa_dated AS fa
    ON fa.ticker = t.ticker AND t.time >= fa.f_time
   AND (fa.next_f_time IS NULL OR t.time < fa.next_f_time)
  LEFT JOIN fin_dated AS fin
    ON fin.ticker = t.ticker AND t.time >= fin.fin_time
   AND (fin.next_fin_time IS NULL OR t.time < fin.next_fin_time)
  LEFT JOIN vni_max3m AS vmax ON vmax.time = t.time
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT t2.time, ARRAY_AGG(s.state ORDER BY s.time DESC LIMIT 1)[OFFSET(0)] AS state
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT time FROM ticker_data) AS t2
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS s ON s.time <= t2.time
    GROUP BY t2.time
  ) AS s5_ff ON s5_ff.time = t.time
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT t2.ticker, t2.time,
      DATE_DIFF(t2.time, MAX(tf.Release_Date), DAY) AS days_since_release
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker, time FROM ticker_data) AS t2
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker_financial AS tf
      ON tf.ticker = t2.ticker AND tf.Release_Date <= t2.time
    GROUP BY t2.ticker, t2.time
  ) AS rel ON rel.ticker = t.ticker AND rel.time = t.time
)
SELECT ticker, time, Close,
  CASE
    WHEN state5 IN (1, 2) THEN 'AVOID_bear'
    WHEN fa_tier = 'E' THEN 'AVOID_faE'
    -- V11 SV_TIGHT Fresh-Q: state 4-5 (BULL) no filter; state 3 (NEUTRAL) ≤60d
    -- State 1 (CRISIS) ≤30d but blocked anyway via AVOID_bear
    WHEN ta >= 170 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('C','D') THEN 'MEGA'
    WHEN ta >= 170 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'S_PRO'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('C','D') THEN 'MOMENTUM'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND fa_tier IN ('A','B') THEN 'MOMENTUM_QUALITY'
    WHEN ta >= 155 AND state5 = 3 AND fa_tier IN ('C','D')
         AND days_since_release IS NOT NULL AND days_since_release <= 60 THEN 'MOMENTUM_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND pe_z < -0.5 AND ta >= 95 AND state5 IN (3,4,5) AND NOT warn_ext THEN 'COMPOUNDER_BUY'
    WHEN fa_tier = 'C' AND ta >= 100 AND state5 IN (4,5) AND ((np_yoy > 0.20) OR (rev_yoy > 0.20)) THEN 'DEEP_VALUE_RECOVERY'
    WHEN ta >= 140 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_S'
    WHEN ta >= 125 AND state5 IN (4,5) THEN 'MOMENTUM_A'
    WHEN ta >= 140 AND state5 = 3 THEN 'MOMENTUM_S_N'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') AND ta >= 70 AND ta < 130 THEN 'COMPOUNDER_HOLD'
    WHEN fa_tier IN ('A','B') THEN 'WAIT'
    ELSE 'PASS'
  END AS play_type,
  ta, liq, sec, days_since_release, state5
